title: Forbidden Deferral Phrases (Dispatch-Wrapper Override)
description: Project-supplied override of the built-in forbidden-deferral phrase + regex lists used by the dispatch-wrapper. When .dw-lifecycle/scope-discovery/forbidden-deferral-phrases.yaml exists, the supplied lists REPLACE the wrapper's built-in defaults (does not merge — the project owns the full list). Built-in defaults are derived from .claude/rules/agent-discipline.md §"'Just for now' is bullshit". At least one of `phrases` or `regexes` must be present with at least one entry.

phrases.description: Case-insensitive substring matches against the Excluded reason. Any hit rejects the dispatch.

regexes.description: Case-insensitive RegExp source strings. Compiled with the 'i' flag by the wrapper. Use when a substring match is too broad (e.g., 'later' is legitimate as 'a later-revision header' but a deferral as 'fix it later').
